differential_diagnoses: Drug reaction with eosinophilia and systemic symptoms (DRESS) syndrome
next_steps: Perform immediate isolation precautions (contact and airborne) given potential for disseminated VZV
Obtain skin scrapings for scabies microscopy (mineral oil preparation)
Perform PCR testing of vesicular fluid and ulcer swab for VZV, HSV-1, and HSV-2
Obtain HIV screening and CD4 count to evaluate for underlying immunosuppression
Perform punch biopsy for H&E histology and immunofluorescence
Initiate empiric intravenous acyclovir pending viral diagnostic results
Conduct serologic evaluation for syphilis (RPR/VDRL with confirmatory treponemal testing)

differential_diagnoses: Drug reaction with eosinophilia and systemic symptoms (DRESS) syndrome
next_steps: Place patient on airborne and contact isolation precautions
Perform PCR testing of vesicular fluid and oral ulcer swab for VZV, HSV-1, and HSV-2
Obtain HIV antibody/antigen testing and CD4 count
Conduct serologic evaluation for syphilis (RPR/VDRL with confirmatory treponemal testing)
Initiate empiric intravenous acyclovir pending viral diagnostic results
Perform a punch biopsy for histopathology and direct fluorescent antibody (DFA) or immunohistochemistry
Obtain a complete blood count with a manual differential and comprehensive metabolic panel to monitor hepatic status
Perform a skin scraping for microscopic evaluation of Sarcoptes scabiei
